case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIFORNIA VS. KATHERINE J GUZMAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-11-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-25-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUZMAN, KATHERINE J $4,756.88 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,416.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
